title: KEEPALIVE_SECS=0 panics write task; client cannot receive messages
description: KEEPALIVE_SECS=0 → tokio::time::interval(Duration::ZERO) panics in the write task (Tokio 1.x documents this panic); the task exits immediately, client_tx is detached, and all post-auth messages are silently dropped for the life of the connection. main.rs accepts 0 silently with a warn-only parse fallback only on non-integer values.
